indexes.title: Index to COVID-19 Oral History Interview with Jill and Mike Kirkham

lines.line: > Interviewer Stephanie Milne-Lane and Narrators Jill and Mike Kirkham conduct introductions. The Kirkham's provide background on their time in Idaho.

metadata.title: Introductions
metadata.synopsis: Interviewer Stephanie Milne-Lane and Narrators Jill and Mike Kirkham conduct introductions. The Kirkham's provide background on their time in Idaho.

lines.line: > The Kirkham's describe how they first learned about COVID-19. They explain that the onset of the pandemic altered plans to purchase a second home. Jill provides insight into how her work at the College of Eastern Idaho changed due to COVID-19. Both Jill and Mike explain how difficult it was to work full time and teach their children who were learning from home.
**Pandemic, Finances, College of Eastern Idaho, children, school, education**
keywords: **Pandemic, Finances, College of Eastern Idaho, children, school, education**

children.text: > Interviewer Stephanie Milne-Lane and Narrators Jill and Mike Kirkham conduct introductions. The Kirkham's provide background on their time in Idaho.

> The Kirkham's describe how they first learned about COVID-19. They explain that the onset of the pandemic altered plans to purchase a second home. Jill provides insight into how her work at the College of Eastern Idaho changed due to COVID-19. Both Jill and Mike explain how difficult it was to work full time and teach their children who were learning from home.
**Pandemic, Finances, College of Eastern Idaho, children, school, education**

> Jill and Mike recount when they started wearing masks. They describe scenarios where they were first adopters of the practice. Mike shares his experience working at the City of Idaho Falls as an attorney and how he first learned about COVID-19.

> Jill narrates her use of the application Tik-Tok as a way to cope during the pandemic. She also describes social-distancing while walking and playing tennis with friends. Jill and Mike share that the entire Kirkham family used the application All Trails during the pandemic.
> Jill and Mike describe how they kept a close eye on the development of COVID-19 vaccines. Both Jill and Mike share how they obtained the vaccine.

> Jill offers insight into her students experiencing pandemic fatigue during the school year. Jill and Mike share that they also suffered from pandemic fatigue. They share the challenges of working, raising kids, and finding ways to cope. Mike shares that he found community online by creating GIFs.
**pandemic fatigue, College of Eastern Idaho, Tik-Tok, GIFs**
> Jill and Mike share experiences of tension or uncomfortable conversations that took place with friends and or family about gathering during the pandemic.
> Mike shares his thoughts on the role politics played during the pandemic. He describes his experiences within the Republican Party in eastern Idaho.
> Jill and Mike wrap up the interview by sharing that they are looking forward to international travel, live performances, and work returning to the pre-pandemic normal.

story.description: Jill and Mike Kirkman share their experiences throughout the COVID-19 pandemic as professionals and parents. Topics such as working, parenting, and coping were discussed.
